hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'co-authored-by: claude|generated with claude|claude code|🤖|claude\.ai|anthropic'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"AI attribution detected in commit message. Remove Claude/AI references before committing."}}'; fi
